LanguageData.VTE_BadEarnings.rulePack.rulesStrings.0: root->[COMPANY] has posted a bad earnings report. Price is expected to move down.
LanguageData.VTE_BelowAverageEarnings.rulePack.rulesS: root->[COMPANY] has posted a below average earnings report. Price is expected to drop slightly.
LanguageData.VTE_CompanyDecline.rulePack.rulesStrings: root->[COMPANY] has reported budget cuts. Share price is bound to decrease in the long term.
root->[COMPANY] has reported steady growth. Share price is bound to increase in the long term.
LanguageData.VTE_DecentEarnings.rulePack.rulesStrings: root->[COMPANY] has posted a decent earnings report. Price is expected to move slightly up.
LanguageData.VTE_ExcellentEarnings.rulePack.rulesStri: root->[COMPANY] has posted an excellent earnings report. Price is expected to jump up.
LanguageData.VTE_FactionInfestationLoot.rulePack.rule: root->[FACTION_name] has finally dealt with their infestations and decided to sell their excess jelly.
root->[FACTION_name] looted the insectoid caves and will sell the jelly on the market.
root->[FACTION_name] got a hold of a large supply of insect jelly and plans to sell it.
LanguageData.VTE_FactionSiegePlan.rulePack.rulesStrin: root->[FACTION_name] plans for a number of siege operations and began stockpiling ammo and weapons.
root->[FACTION_name] is preparing for war and will stockpile ammo and weapons.
root->[FACTION_name] buys excess amounts of weapons and mortar shells.
LanguageData.VTE_FearOfBankruptcy.rulePack.rulesStrin: root->[COMPANY] is rumored to announce bankruptcy. Share price can either crash or skyrocket.
LanguageData.VTE_GoodEarnings.rulePack.rulesStrings.0: root->[COMPANY] has posted a good earnings report. Price is expected to move slightly up.
root->[COMPANY] has posted a great earnings report. Price is expected to move up.
LanguageData.VTE_MediocreEarnings.rulePack.rulesStrin: root->[COMPANY] has posted a mediocre earnings report. Price is expected to move sideways.
LanguageData.VTE_NewShipPurchased.rulePack.rulesStrin: root->[COMPANY] has purchased a brand new low orbit trading ship. Share price should go up in the long term.
LanguageData.VTE_OutstandingEarnings.rulePack.rulesSt: root->[COMPANY] has posted an outstanding earnings report. Price is expected to skyrocket.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementAlphabeavers.rulePack.rule: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] is struggling with a pack of alphabeavers, and purchases a large quantity of wood.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] ran out of wood and will buy it in bulk.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] requires copious amounts of wood for their project.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementAlphabeaversDealtWith.rule: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] has gotten rid of the beaver pack that troubled them, and now sell excess wood.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] cut down a large chunk of the forest with the intent to sell wood.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementApparelPurchase.rulePack.r: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] acquires a large amount of apparel.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementApparelSellOff.rulePack.ru: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] sells a large amount of apparel.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementArmorPurchase.rulePack.rul: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] acquires a large amount of armor.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementArmorSellOff.rulePack.rule: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] sells a large amount of armor.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementBigHarvest.rulePack.rulesS: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] has had an amazing harvest and sells off their food supplies.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] plans to sell large quantities of food.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] has had a fortunate harvest and will sell the excess food.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementBlight.rulePack.rulesStrin: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] has suffered a terrible blight and buys off large quantities of food.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] has had their food stockpile burn down.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] plans to purchase large quantity of food.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementBodyPartsPurchase.rulePack: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] acquires a large amount of body parts.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] sells a large amount of body parts.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementColdSnap.rulePack.rulesStr: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] has been struck with coldsnap, ruining their food supply.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] has lost their food supply.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementCombatEmergency.rulePack.r: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] buys off large amounts of weapons due to an emergency.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] prepares to go to war and will purchase weapons.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] requires a large amount of weapons quite urgently. Prices are expected to go up.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementDrugsPurchase.rulePack.rul: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] acquires a large amount of drugs.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementDrugsSellOff.rulePack.rule: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] sells a large amount of drugs.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementGotPlague.rulePack.rulesSt: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] is struggling with a plague. Medicine purchasing frenzy began.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] is recovering after a raid. Medicine will be purchased in bulk.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] is in dire need of medicine, which means the price will go up.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementGotRaided.rulePack.rulesSt: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] was recently raided. Rebuilding is underway.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] suffered a natural disaster and will purchase building materials.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] plans to expand, but will require building materials to do so.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementHeatWave.rulePack.rulesStr: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] has suffered a terrible heat wave and decided to sell off their food before it rots.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] has had a freezer malfunction and sells food before it rots.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementLeatherPurchase.rulePack.r: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] acquires a large amount of leathers.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] acquires copious amounts of various leathers.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementLeatherSellOff.rulePack.ru: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] sells a large amount of leathers.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementManhunterMeat.rulePack.rul: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] sells off large quantities of meat they obtained from a manhunter pack.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] had a very bountiful hunting trip and will sell excess meat.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] no longer requires their meat and will soon flood the market with it.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementMechanoidShipsSalvaged.rul: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] has dealt with Defoliator ships and now sell excess plasteel.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] has mined a large amount of plasteel and plans to sell it.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementPlagueDealtWith.rulePack.r: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] dealt with their plague and now sells excess medicine.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] no longer has any need for their medicine stockpiles.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementPowerArmorUpgrade.rulePack: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] has decided to upgrade their defenses with a new set of powered armors. They buy Plasteel in bulk.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] requires plasteel and plans to buy a lot of it in bulk.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] improves their defenses and plans to obtain plasteel, steel and components.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementPrisonBreak.rulePack.rules: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] had a prison break. They promise to step up the security.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] plans to equip everyone with new weapons.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementPrisonBreakDealtWith.ruleP: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] had a prison break which failed dramatically. They decided to sell excess weaponry and armor.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] decided not to go to war. They will sell their weapons and armors.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] will sell their old weapons and armors.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementRecentRaidSellOff.rulePack: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] was recently raided. Looters sell off whatever they stole.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] scavenged a lot of useful junk and will soon flood the market with it.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] plans to empty the stockpiles.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementStoneBlocksPurchase.rulePa: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] acquires a large amount of stone blocks.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementStoneBlocksSellOff.rulePac: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] sells a large amount of stone blocks.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementTechprintsPurchase.rulePac: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] acquires a large amount of techprints.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementTechprintsSellOff.rulePack: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] sells a large amount of techprints.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementTextilePurchase.rulePack.r: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] acquires a large amount of textiles.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] plans to supply their tailors with copious amounts of textiles.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementTextileSellOff.rulePack.ru: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] sells a large amount of textiles.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementWeaponsMeleePurchase.ruleP: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] acquires a large amount of melee weapons.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementWeaponsMeleeSellOff.rulePa: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] sells a large amount of melee weapons.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementWeaponsRangedPurchase.rule: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] acquires a large amount of ranged weapons.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementWeaponsRangedSellOff.ruleP: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] sells a large amount of ranged weapons.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementWoolsPurchase.rulePack.rul: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] acquires a large amount of wools.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] buys large amounts of various wools.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementWoolsSellOff.rulePack.rule: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] sells a large amount of wools.
LanguageData.VTE_SettlementZzzt.rulePack.rulesStrings: root->[SETTLEMENT_label] suffered a Zzzt, and now plans to purchase a large amount of building materials to rebuild.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] suffered a gas explosion and will need building materials to rebuild.
root->[SETTLEMENT_label] plans an expansion and will acquire building resources. Prices are bound to go up.
LanguageData.VTE_ShipCrashed.rulePack.rulesStrings.0: root->[COMPANY] has reported that one of their ships has crashed. Share price should go down.
LanguageData.VTE_SubParEarnings.rulePack.rulesStrings: root->[COMPANY] has posted a subpar earnings report. Price is expected to drop slightly.
LanguageData.VTE_TerribleEarnings.rulePack.rulesStrin: root->[COMPANY] has posted a terrible earnings report. Price is expected to crash.
LanguageData.VTE_VeryBadEarnings.rulePack.rulesString: root->[COMPANY] has posted a very bad earnings report. Price is expected to fall sharply.
